video_prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. character (charA_v1): short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand. prop (mug_red_v1): state: on table, visually consistent. Protagonist A inserts the key into the lock., The door swings open by itself., Inside, he sees the same table and the same red mug as in his own kitchen. Narration: "钥匙刚插进去，门自己开了。屋里摆着同样的桌，同样的红杯。". Protagonist A says: "这不是隔壁，这是我家。". Camera motion: medium shot, subtle hand-held camera feel, focus on subject action. A door opening by itself, interior view of a kitchen with a table and a red mug, man standing at threshold, surprised expression, warm light, cinematic, medium shot. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. Scene layout locked to context reference frame. Do not reposition props or alter lighting source.. All props match reference images exactly. Prop must_keep: shape, color, size, material unchanged.. Camera transition smooth from previous shot continuity frame. No abrupt jump cut between shots. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.

negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, bright, cartoonish, messy, multiple characters, duplicate person, clone, inconsistent lighting, wrong angle, lens distortion, chromatic aberration, mouth mismatch, silent face, frozen expression, unnatural dubbing, face morphing, character drift, outfit change, prop mutation, scene layout shift, extra fingers, distorted limbs, text artifacts, burnt-in subtitles, logo, watermark, motion blur excessive, flickering, framing jump cut
camera_motion: medium shot, subtle hand-held camera feel, focus on subject action

action_beats: Protagonist A inserts the key into the lock.
The door swings open by itself.
Inside, he sees the same table and the same red mug as in his own kitchen.

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 钥匙刚插进去，门自己开了。屋里摆着同样的桌，同样的红杯。

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

workflow.tool_instructions: No keyframes found yet. Generate keyframe images first using build-image-prompts, save them to S013/keyframes, then re-run this compiler for img2vid conditioning. Text-to-video is still possible with just 'video_prompt'.
